name: Intellipaat
short: The organization that transformed a fresher into the professional I am today.
message:
Dear Intellipaat,

Every journey has a beginning, and mine began here on 31st July 2023. I walked into this organization with excitement, curiosity, and honestly, very little idea about what the corporate world looked like.

UI/UX became the very first technology I learned here. I had absolutely no prior knowledge of it, but this organization gave me the opportunity to start somewhere. That first opportunity eventually became the foundation of everything that followed.

Soon, my journey expanded into DevOps, Cloud, AWS, Linux, AWS-DevOps, DevSecOps, Python, HTML, CSS, JavaScript and many other technologies. Every project, every responsibility, every challenge made me grow—not only technically but personally.

Apart from technology, Intellipaat gave me opportunities that no classroom ever could. I handled operational work, worked with IIT Jammu, VNIT, NIT Sikkim and several prestigious institutes, handled student escalations, conducted one-on-one mentoring sessions, resolved technical tickets, interacted directly with learners, delivered presentations, managed teams, and eventually got the opportunity to become a Team Lead.

The confidence I carry today, the leadership I have developed, and the way I approach problems are all deeply influenced by my journey here.

Thank you for believing in me, trusting me with responsibilities, allowing me to make mistakes, and helping me become a better professional every single day.

Whatever I am today, a significant part of my journey will always belong to Intellipaat.

Thank you for giving me my first corporate home.

name: Hemant Sir
short: The person who introduced me to professional quality and perfection.
message:
Dear Hemanth Sir,

Our journey started around 29th September 2023 during the UI/UX course revamp. That was the first time I had the opportunity to work closely with you.

To be very honest, I had never seriously prepared professional presentations before. The level of precision, quality, storytelling and learner-centric thinking that you expected completely changed the way I looked at creating content.

Every review, every feedback and every discussion taught me something valuable.

Beyond presentations, I also learned from observing how you communicate with learners, interact during hackathons, and represent yourself professionally. Those experiences became lessons that extended far beyond UI/UX.

Also I had the opportunity to know you personally as well. The conversations we had, the advice you shared, and the perspective you gave me about work and life will always stay with me.

Thank you for every lesson, every correction, every opportunity and every word of encouragement.

You played an important role in shaping the professional I became.

name: Akshay Sir
short: The first Team Lead of my corporate journey and one of my biggest mentors.
message:
Dear Akshay Sir,

From my very first day at Intellipaat, you have been my Team Lead. Looking back today, I genuinely realize that almost everything I know professionally has some contribution from your guidance.

Whether it was UI/UX, DevOps, Linux, taking sessions, handling learners, or managing responsibilities, you always stood there to guide me whenever I needed help.

I still remember the day I was assigned my very first Linux batch. I was extremely nervous because it was the first time I was going to teach learners. You motivated me, encouraged me to trust myself, and reminded me that confidence comes with experience.

Those words stayed with me, and eventually teaching became one of the most enjoyable parts of my work.

Three years cannot be summarized into a single paragraph. There are countless memories, countless lessons and countless moments where your guidance helped me become a better professional and a better leader.

Thank you for trusting me with responsibilities, believing in my capabilities and helping me grow.

Whatever leadership qualities I have today are deeply inspired by the opportunities and guidance you provided.

Thank you for everything, Sir.

name: Harshit Bhaiya
short: From 'Sir' to 'Bhaiya': Thank you for teaching me operations and ownership.
message:
Dear Harshit Bhaiya,

I still remember seeing you on my joining day and honestly thinking, 'Who is this serious person?' I was genuinely a little scared at first.

Over time, that 'Sir' naturally became 'Bhaiya', and that itself reflects how much our professional relationship evolved.

Initially we didn't work together very often, but when I started handling VNIT, IIT Jammu, NIT Sikkim and various operational responsibilities, I got the opportunity to learn from you.

You taught me how to handle customers, operational challenges, escalations, refunds and difficult situations with confidence.

I also remember preparing for Python mocks where your guidance gave me clarity about what was expected.

Thank you for every lesson, every suggestion and every piece of guidance.

I'm truly grateful for everything I learned from you.

name: Former Team Members
short: People may leave an organization, but they never leave the memories they create.
message: Before I start thanking the people who are currently at Intellipaat, I want to sincerely thank a few people who were a very important part of my journey but have already moved on to new opportunities. Syan Bhaiya, Chinnappa, Harsh, Anmol and Animesh: Thank You. You all played a significant role in teaching me UI/UX, DevOps and many of the technical foundations that I still carry today. Even though you are no longer part of Intellipaat, your contribution to my journey will always remain a part of my story. Thank you for every lesson, every discussion and every piece of guidance.

name: Keshav Bhaiya
short: A leader who taught me that patience is one of the strongest leadership qualities.
message: Dear Keshav Bhaiya, thank you for everything. During the time you were leading the team in Bangalore, I had the opportunity to learn not only technical skills but also leadership. The way you handled people, managed responsibilities and remained patient in every situation taught me lessons that extended far beyond work. Thank you for always being approachable, supportive and inspiring. Wishing you continued success in everything you do.

name: Deep
short: A leader who perfectly balanced discipline with kindness.
message: Dear Deep, Although we were not directly connected through the same domain, We always belonged to the same Cloud family. I truly appreciate the bond we shared. The way you managed the team impressed me a lot ,you always knew when to be strict and when to be supportive. That balance is something I genuinely admire. Thank you for always being approachable and for every interaction we had. Wishing you all the very best.

name: DevOps Team
short: Not just a team ,My Family, My Biggest Strength and My Proudest Achievement.
message:
Dear DevOps Team,

I honestly don't know where to begin because no paragraph will ever be enough to describe what you all mean to me.

Thank you Uday, Rishabh, Anushka, Akshat, Gaurav, Aditya, Ayushi and everyone who has been part of this journey. I also want to thank Muskan, Ashesh, Hemant and everyone who has moved on from the organization.

You all didn't just help me become a better Team Lead you helped me become a better person.

Whether it was working together, solving issues, sharing memes, laughing over random conversations, discussing personal problems, going out together or simply spending everyday moments in the office, every memory is special.

Some of you called me 'Didi', some called me 'Ma'am', but every single one of you earned a very special place in my heart.

I know every one of you has tremendous potential. Continue working hard, keep learning and make sure people continue recognizing the DevOps team for the amazing work you all do.

If there is one thing I want from all of you, it is this—keep making yourselves proud and somewhere, make your Team Lead proud too.

I'm going to miss each one of you far more than words can express.

Thank you for being my team, my support system and my family.

name: AWS Team
short: Thank you for always being there whenever I needed help.
message:
Dear AWS Team,

Thank you Swati, Navya, Abhay and Anurag. Even though we belonged to different responsibilities at times, I always found support whenever I approached any of you. Whether it was technical discussions, coordination or simply helping each other whenever required, you all made my journey much easier. Thank you for being wonderful colleagues and wonderful people. Wishing every one of you continued success in your careers.

name: Sahil
short: Always dependable whenever work needed to be done.
message:
Dear Sahil,

Thank you for being such a dependable teammate. Whenever I needed your help or assigned you a task, you always completed it sincerely. Your reliability made my work much easier. I truly appreciate your dedication and wish you all the very best for your future. Keep learning, keep growing and keep making people proud.

name: Abhivarshni
short: Thank you for always supporting me whenever I needed help.
message:
Dear Abhi,

Thank you for always being there whenever I needed help, especially while handling VNIT, IIT Jammu and NIT batches. You made many challenging days much easier through your support. I genuinely appreciate your calm nature and your willingness to help whenever required. Wishing you a wonderful career ahead.

name: Divyansh
short: Our leg-pulling conversations will always be remembered.
message:
Dear Divyansh,

I know you always used to say, 'Ma'am, aap mere hi peeche padhi ho!' 😄 But trust me, it was never personal. You have always been a sincere and capable person. Sometimes I had to follow up repeatedly because responsibilities demanded it, but I always knew you were someone who would eventually get the work done. Thank you for every effort, every task and every laugh. Keep that positive energy alive and all the best for everything ahead.

name: Shashwat
short: Thank you for every conversation, complaint and smile.
message:
Dear Shashwat,

Although we didn't work together extensively on every project, the interactions we had were always memorable. Whether it was handling work, travelling to BTM or those funny conversations where you used to say 'Ma'am ye kya ho raha hai?', every moment added another memory to this journey. Thank you for being yourself. Wishing you great success ahead.

name: Bibek
short: A wonderful colleague and an even better person.
message:
Dear Bibek,

Thank you for being such an amazing colleague. Not only professionally but personally as well, our interactions have always been enjoyable

name: Nikita
short: Thank you for making my work easier every single time.
message:
Dear Nikita,

Thank you for always helping whenever I reached out to you. Your dedication and sincerity made my journey much smoother. I truly appreciate every contribution you made. Wishing you all the success you deserve.

name: Mounika
short: Thank you for always being supportive.
message:
Dear Mounika,

Thank you for every bit of support throughout our journey together. Whenever work came your way, you handled it sincerely. It was wonderful working with you. I wish you endless growth and happiness in your future.

name: Niharika
short: A sincere teammate who was always ready to help.
message:
Dear Niharika,

Thank you for always being cooperative and supportive. Working with you was truly a pleasant experience. I hope you continue achieving wonderful milestones in your career. Wishing you all the very best.

name: Roopali
short: Thank you for your dedication and positivity.
message:
Dear Roopali,

Thank you for every contribution you made throughout our journey together. Your willingness to support whenever required never went unnoticed. Wishing you a future filled with achievements and happiness.

name: Laiba
short: Thank you for always helping whenever needed.
message:
Dear Laiba,

Thank you for being such a supportive teammate. Every interaction with you has always been pleasant and professional. I truly appreciate your efforts and wish you nothing but success in your journey ahead.

name: Siddharth
short: Thank you for every interaction and every bit of support.
message:
Dear Siddharth,

Although we didn't get the opportunity to work together extensively, every interaction we had was pleasant and meaningful. Thank you for always being supportive and cooperative whenever required. Wishing you great success and happiness in everything you do. Keep learning and keep growing.

name: Uday
short: Thank you for being a wonderful teammate.
message:
Dear Uday,

Thank you for all the support throughout my journey at Intellipaat. Even though we weren't directly connected on every project, I always appreciated your positive attitude and willingness to help. I hope you continue achieving great milestones in your career. Wishing you all the very best.

name: Kanishka
short: Every interaction added another memory to this journey.
message:
Dear Kanishka,

Thank you for being a part of my Intellipaat journey. Every conversation and every interaction added another wonderful memory. I appreciate your support and professionalism. Wishing you endless growth, happiness and success.

name: Armaan
short: Thank you for every contribution, no matter how small or big.
message:
Dear Armaan,

Although we didn't work together extensively, I truly appreciate every interaction we shared. Thank you for always being supportive whenever needed. I wish you nothing but success, happiness and amazing opportunities ahead.

name: Kirushakkarasu KT
short: Our journey was short, but I'm glad our paths crossed.
message:
Dear Kirus,

Even though you recently joined and we didn't get much time to work together, I'm really happy that our paths crossed. I hope you enjoy this journey, continue learning and make the most of every opportunity. Wishing you a wonderful future.

name: Sanket

message:
Dear Sanket,

Our professional journey together was short, but I genuinely enjoyed whatever interactions we had. I hope Intellipaat gives you the same opportunities to learn and grow that it gave me. Wishing you a successful career ahead.

name: Vaibhav
short: May this be just the beginning of an amazing career.
message:
Dear Vaibhav,

Thank you for being a part of my journey. I hope this is only the beginning of many wonderful achievements in your career. Continue learning, keep believing in yourself and never stop growing. Wishing you all the very best.

name: Jatin
short: Wishing you success in every chapter ahead.
message:
Dear Jatin,

Although our interactions were limited, I'm grateful for every opportunity we had to work together. Thank you for being supportive and cooperative. I wish you a career filled with success, happiness and continuous learning.

name: Pranav
short: Some bonds go beyond projects and responsibilities.
message:
Dear Pranav,

You deserve a special mention because even though we weren't working together directly every day, I always enjoyed our conversations and interactions. Thank you for being such a wonderful person. I truly appreciate every memory we created. Wishing you nothing but happiness and success.

name: Mansi Di
short: Thank you for every interaction and every smile.
message:
Dear Mansi Di,

Although we belonged to different teams, every interaction with you was always warm and pleasant. Thank you for always being so kind and supportive. Wishing you continued success and happiness in everything you do.

name: Garvita
short: It was wonderful sharing this journey with you.
message:
Dear Garvita,

Thank you for being a part of my Intellipaat journey. Every interaction, no matter how small, added another positive memory. Wishing you endless success, happiness and wonderful opportunities ahead.

name: Jiya
short: Every good colleague makes the workplace better.
message:
Dear Jiya,

Thank you for every interaction throughout this journey. It was lovely working in the same organization and getting to know such wonderful people. Wishing you a future full of happiness, growth and success.

name: Deepak Sir
short: Thank you for always guiding me whenever I needed support.
message:
Dear Deepak Sir,

Thank you for always being there whenever I needed guidance. It was never just about sessions or operations; I learned many valuable professional lessons simply by observing the way you handled situations. Your calmness, experience and willingness to help made many difficult moments much easier. Thank you for every lesson, every suggestion and every opportunity to learn. Wishing you continued success and happiness.

name: Benzy Bhaiya
short: The person who always came to the rescue.
message:
Dear Benzy Bhaiya,

If there is one thing I will always remember, it is that no matter what time it was—morning, evening or even during a live session—you were always ready to help. Whenever I reached out, you never hesitated. Thank you for always rescuing us whenever we got stuck. Your support has been invaluable throughout my journey. Thank you for everything, Bhaiya.

name: Aman Bhaiya
short: Some colleagues become family.
message:
Dear Aman Bhaiya,

There's a reason I always called you 'Bhaiya'. The bond we shared was much more than just a professional one. I still remember the countless conversations we had about work, life and so many random things in between. Those memories will always stay with me. Thank you for being such a wonderful person and for always making the workplace feel more like home. I'm truly going to miss our conversations.

name: Gopi Bhaiya
short: One of the kindest people I have ever met.
message:
Dear Gopi Bhaiya,

You are honestly one of the sweetest, kindest and most humble people I have ever met. Every time I came to you for help, you never refused. Your calm nature and genuine willingness to support everyone made a huge difference. Thank you for always being there. Stay exactly the way you are because people like you are truly rare.

name: Bibhash
short: Thank you for always helping whenever VNIT needed attention.
message:
Dear Bibhash,

Thank you for every bit of support, especially while handling VNIT, IIT Jammu and NIT Sikkim. Whenever I reached out, you always responded immediately and helped without hesitation. I genuinely appreciate your dedication and your willingness to support whenever required. Wishing you great success in everything ahead.

name: Sorabh
short: Thank you for always extending a helping hand.
message:
Dear Sorabh,

Thank you for all your support throughout my journey. Every time I approached you, you were always willing to help. I truly appreciate your cooperation and professionalism. Wishing you continued success and happiness.

name: Mihir
short: Every interaction mattered.
message:
Dear Mihir,

Although we didn't work together extensively, I still wanted to thank you for every interaction we shared. Every small contribution and every conversation became a part of my journey. Wishing you all the very best for your future.

name: Entire Operations Team
short: To everyone whose name I may have unintentionally missed...
message:
To the entire Operations Team,

If I have unintentionally missed mentioning anyone individually, please know that it was never intentional. Every single person I interacted with, worked alongside or even shared a small conversation with has contributed in some way to my journey. Thank you for making my experience at Intellipaat memorable. You have all been an amazing team to work with. I wish each one of you endless success and happiness.

name: Mahesh Sir
short: Thank you for every interaction and every support.
message:
Dear Mahesh Sir,

Although we worked together only on certain occasions, every interaction with you was always positive. Thank you for all your support and cooperation whenever our paths crossed. I truly appreciate your professionalism and kindness. Wishing you continued success in everything you do.

name: Aditya
short: Thank you for being supportive throughout our interactions.
message:
Dear Aditya,

Thank you for every interaction we shared during my journey at Intellipaat especially a word
. Although we were part of different responsibilities, you were always supportive whenever needed. I genuinely appreciate it. Wishing you a wonderful career ahead.

name: Shrimati Ma'am
short: Thank you for always being kind and supportive.
message:
Dear Shrimati Ma'am,

It was truly wonderful interacting with you throughout my journey. Thank you for your kindness, support and professionalism. Wishing you lots of happiness, good health and success.

name: Rita Ma'am
short: Every interaction added another beautiful memory.
message:
Dear Rita Ma'am,

Thank you for every interaction we shared. Your warmth and professionalism always made communication pleasant. I sincerely appreciate your support throughout my journey. Wishing you all the very best.

name: Brinda Ma'am
short: Thank you for making this journey memorable.
message:
Dear Brinda Ma'am,

Although we didn't work together every day, every interaction with you was meaningful. Thank you for your support and cooperation. I wish you continued success and happiness.

name: Burhan
short: Thank you for every bit of support.
message:
Dear Burhan,

Thank you for being a wonderful colleague throughout my journey. Every interaction with you was always positive and helpful. I truly appreciate your support and wish you all the very best for everything ahead.

name: Samarth
short: A sincere thank you for being part of this journey.
message:
Dear Samarth,

Thank you for every interaction, every conversation and every contribution throughout this journey. It was wonderful working alongside you. Wishing you endless success and happiness.

name: Pradeep
short: Thank you for being a part of my story.
message:
Dear Pradeep,

Thank you for every interaction and every moment we shared while working together. Every person contributes something valuable to our journey, and you certainly did. Wishing you all the very best.

name: Anand Ji
short: The sweetest person who treated everyone with equal respect.
message:
Dear Anand Ji,

One thing I will always remember about you is the respect with which you addressed everyone. Whether someone was a junior or a senior, you always spoke with kindness and humility. That quality makes you truly special. Thank you for being such a wonderful human being. Stay exactly the way you are.

name: Madhu Di
short: Thank you for your kindness and positivity.
message:
Dear Madhu Di,

Thank you for being such a wonderful and kind person. Every interaction with you was always pleasant. I truly appreciate your warmth and positivity. Wishing you endless happiness and success.

name: Vijay Sir
short: The person who always solved our technical issues.
message:
Dear Vijay Sir,

Thank you for always helping us whenever we needed any IT support. Whether it was resetting passwords, fixing mail IDs or resolving technical issues, you were always there to help us with a smile. Thank you for making our work easier every single time. Wishing you continued success and happiness.

name: Puneet Bhaiya
short: Thank you for always keeping our systems running.
message:
Dear Puneet Bhaiya,

Thank you for always helping us with laptops, hardware issues and every technical problem that came our way. Your support often went unnoticed because everything simply started working again after you fixed it. Thank you for always being there whenever we needed help.

name: MIS Team
short: Every request was met with support and cooperation.
message:
Dear MIS Team,

Whenever I reached out regarding reports, data or any support, you were always ready to help. Although we didn't interact every day, every interaction reflected your professionalism and willingness to support. Thank you for being an important part of my journey. Wishing the entire team continued success.

name: Placement Team
short: Thank you for every interaction along the way.
message:
Dear Placement Team,

Although our interactions were limited, every conversation was always pleasant and professional. Thank you for all your support and cooperation. Wishing the entire team success and happiness in the years to come.

name: HR Team
short: Thank you for supporting me throughout my journey.
message:
Dear HR Team,

From my joining formalities to every HR-related interaction during my journey, thank you for always being supportive and approachable. Every organization grows because of the people working behind the scenes, and you all have been an important part of my journey. Thank you for everything.

name: A Final Goodbye
short: Every ending is simply the beginning of another journey.
message:
Dear Everyone,

If you have reached this message, thank you for taking the time to read my little farewell website.

As I write this, it is difficult to believe that almost three years have passed since I first walked into Intellipaat on 31st July 2023. A fresher with countless questions is now leaving with countless memories.

This organization gave me much more than a job. It gave me opportunities, responsibilities, confidence, friendships, mentors and experiences that shaped me into the person I am today.

If I have ever unknowingly hurt anyone, made mistakes or fallen short of expectations, I sincerely apologize. It was never intentional.

If I have ever helped you, inspired you, solved a problem for you, shared a laugh with you, taught you something or simply made your day a little better, then I consider my journey successful.

Every meeting, every session, every coffee break, every deadline, every laugh, every challenge and every conversation has become a memory that I will carry with me forever.

Although this chapter is ending, the relationships and memories will always remain.

I wish every single one of you happiness, success, good health and endless opportunities.

Keep learning.
Keep growing.
Keep smiling.

Thank you for being a part of my story.

This isn't goodbye...
It's simply one last deployment.

With love, gratitude and countless memories,

❤️ Tripti Singh
